description: Enterprise pack - Maximum safety with logging, compliance, and strict guardrails

notes.settingsPrecedence: Settings precedence (highest to lowest): Enterprise managed settings > Project local overrides (settings.local.json) > Project settings (this file) > User settings (~/.claude/claude.json)
notes.permissionEvaluation: Permission evaluation order: Deny → Ask → Allow (first match wins)
notes.testBlocking: run-tests-on-stop.sh can be configured to block (set CLAUDE_TEST_BLOCKING=true) or run non-blocking (default). Document your organization's preference.
